name: agent-plan-platform
description: Harness-agnostic core for Agent Plan: schemas, persistence, ordering, status rollups, and markdown rendering.

scripts.build:pi-adapter: pnpm build:web-ui && bash scripts/copy-web-ui.sh && pnpm --filter @agent-plan/pi-adapter build
scripts.release:pack-dry-run: for p in packages/plan-core packages/plan-mcp packages/plan-server packages/agent-plan; do echo '=== ' $p; (cd "$p" && npm pack --dry-run); echo; done
scripts.release:publish: pnpm --filter @agent-plan/core publish --access public && pnpm --filter @agent-plan/mcp publish --access public && pnpm --filter @agent-plan/server publish --access public && pnpm --filter agent-plan publish --access public && pnpm --filter @agent-plan/pi-adapter publish --access public --no-git-checks
